name: Loresheet: The City That Works
description: Your chronicle centers on a domain where institutions still function. Once per story, gain a beat when your actions visibly shore up civic order or public trust.

name: Loresheet: Forgotten Quarter
description: You haunt a neglected district. While acting in that territory, you may treat one failed hunt roll per chapter as a success with a complication chosen by the Storyteller.

name: Loresheet: Old Money, New Blood
description: Dynastic wealth defines your Requiem. Once per story, spend a Willpower to substitute Resources for a single Social roll where old money would plausibly matter.

name: Loresheet: The Last True Church
description: Faith still shapes the domain. You gain 8-again on rolls to resist supernatural fear or coercion in consecrated ground you have personally tended.

name: Loresheet: War in the Shadows
description: Cold war between covenants is the default. When you uncover a rival covenant's covert operation, take a beat and open one extra Door on the next maneuver against a member of that covenant this chapter.

name: Loresheet: The Long Defiance
description: Your coterie resists the Danse as a matter of principle. Once per chapter, a coterie member may reroll one die on a roll made to protect another member from destruction or exile.

name: Loresheet: Bloodied Crown
description: Princes rise and fall violently here. When you witness a Praxis seizure or formal challenge, mark a beat and gain a +1 bonus on your next City Status roll this story.

name: Loresheet: The Hungry City
description: Feeding is never casual. The first hunt you attempt each night gains a +1 bonus; the second suffers a −1 penalty unless you accept a stain or complication from the Storyteller.

name: Loresheet: Paper Trail
description: Bureaucracy remembers. Once per story, you may declare that a mundane institution (bank, hospital, precinct) has a file relevant to the scene; the Storyteller frames what it actually reveals.

name: Loresheet: Kindred Noir
description: The chronicle leans on investigation and moral grime. When you accept a Condition to advance a mystery beat, also take a beat toward a Merit purchase later this story.

name: Loresheet: The Open Grave
description: Death is never far. In scenes involving corpses, the dead, or hauntings, you may add one die to Occult or Empathy rolls (choose when the scene begins).

name: Loresheet: Neon Cathedral
description: The domain's sacred and profane blur. Once per session, treat a nightclub, gallery, or stadium as sanctified for one Theban Sorcery sacrament requirement at Storyteller discretion.
